final:
// // This module converts a 4-bit binary number to its Gray code equivalent on every negative edge of the clock.
module binary_to_gray (
	input clk,
	input [3:0] binary_in,
	output reg [3:0] gray_out);always @(posedge clk)
		gray_out <= (binary_in >> 1) ^ binary_in;

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module converts a 4-bit binary number to its Gray code equivalent on every negative edge of the clock.
